review_text:
Lovely little park with direct access to the beach. The beach is frequented by many park guests.
Most of the caravan sites are quite small and it can be handy to get other campers to help backing into the tight spaces.
Amenities were spotless and constantly clean.
Our visit was over the Easter long weekend.
If in Cowes we would be back at this park.

We used one of the on-site cabins this weekend, and had a lovely time. The cabin was clean and had everything we needed in it. It's right on the beach, and an easy walk into Cowes, and the staff were friendly and helpful. Thanks for a wonderful weekend away.

Nice park close to beach. We have a 21ft van and found the sites a little difficult to get the van into.
We would visit there again, however, there was one park employee who was rude to myself and my wife in two separate incidents which was totally uncalled for.

We camped at Beach Park Caravan Park for two nights, we have camped all around Australia but found this campground to be the saddest most unkempt caravan park we have ever stayed at. Further my wife was abused by one of the staff soon after arrival. The camp site was small and awkwardly shaped, things were broken everywhere, the camp kitchen was unclean and pathetically equipped (not to mention the dodgy power point on the wall), the table tennis bats were all broken as was the tip on the pool cue.
Plaatsen zijn minimum afmetingen. Juist groot genoeg maar dichtbij elkaar. Privacy screen geen overbodige luxe.
We have been coming here for years. The facilities are brilliant and well maintained. So close to the beach and Cowes main street.

We loved our stay and the staff was great! Bit older but part of its charm. The only down side was a big family group acting very entitled and rather noisy and practically a bunch of adults behaving very immaturely so if you looking for a quiet stay perhaps not suitable.
Would never have  stayed if I had to pay. Rooms were clean to the eye but under the bed and lounge were filthy. Only good thing was location...
We love our. Have been coming for over 15 years.

I like to have no expectations then when i arrive to my destination i am pleasantly surprised.||This place is a small clean park. Very friendly and the prices are good. The caravan sites are a good size. Family loved it. We will be back. Budget great for family.
First time to Phillip Island fantastic caravan park fantastic BBQ area toilets and showers where spotless, laundry facility great highly recommend
Very amazing

Nous avons passé 2 nuits ici, le camping est assez étroit et vous êtes un peu les uns sur les autres mais hormis cela nous avons passé un très bon moment, les douches et toilettes étaient propres, la cuisine commune même un peu usée fonctionnait, l'accès direct à la plage est un vrai plus.

A very nice little campground right on the beach. The owner (we think it was him) gave us a very friendly welcome. The site is well maintained and also has a pool which we used straight away. As there wasn't too much going on, the owner invited us to check out whenever we wanted. We can only recommend the campground. Many thanks for a relaxing, albeit short, stay.
Great site.. very friendly and helpful staff. Very clean amenities.

We spent Easter weekend here for 4 nights on powered sites. Beautiful place, easy access to everything,  clean facilities and more than helpful staff! We loved it so much we will be back next year! Thanks again for a great weekend 👍

Ein absolut sauberer und gepflegter Platz!
BBQ und Küche vorhanden. Allerdings sind die Herdplatten etwas kaputt und der Kühlschrank dreckig - das könnte man leicht verbessern.
Preis 50 AUD
Würde jederzeit wieder hier übernachten.

The location is awesome
The sites are all great, we had a drive-through p/w
The amenities are old however kept very clean.
I would recommend this place highly.
Friendly staff,clean camp sites and kitchen, toilets , close to town centre.
Amazing guys its the best experience i ever had next to beach bbq is not allowed in caravan park but beach is next to it bring your bbq n enjoy it

We stayed in the tent for 3 night. The caravan park has a private path to the beach. It's very quiet and clean. The manager gave us a perfect site to fit a 12x15 tent with an awning. We will definitely come back.

2 night stay in an Eco - cabin. Great location with beach out the back down a short path, and a solar heated pool as well.
This caravan park may have been around for a long time but the staff are friendly and helpful, cabins, grounds and amenities are clean and well maintained and quiet location makes for a very relaxing stay.  4 stars on rooms only because of age - very clean & comfortable.
Is a great park on the beach within walking distance to the main streets.
Took the family and caravan here. great little place, nice and relaxed. Very clean and maintained. We will be back for sure!

Great Park, we regularly visit Cowes on Phillip Island and this is our go to caravan park.  The owners give us a great site large enough to fit our 21ft caravan and has ample space to park our car. Extremely relaxed park and only 30metres or so to the beach.  Amenities are regularly cleaned and they just installed some brand new bar-b-ques for our use and no need to put coins in because they are free to be used by guest

Budget accommodation but priced accordingly, beds very basic comfort, no hot water in our cabin so we had to either boil water or shower/bath in the shower block instead of the ensuite.  Gas stove had to be lit by hand.
